name: GameAnalytics
description: Free, gaming-focused analytics SDK with prebuilt KPIs for mobile and PC titles, covering DAU, retention, monetization and progression.

seo.title: GameAnalytics — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: GameAnalytics: Free, gaming-focused analytics SDK with prebuilt KPIs for mobile and PC titles, covering DAU, retention, monetization and progression.

when_to_use: Free mobile game KPI dashboard: DAU, retention, LTV
Funnel analysis for level completion drop-off
Monetization analytics for in-app purchase optimization
Custom event tracking for game economy balance
Multi-platform analytics SDK for PC and mobile titles

pros: Free tier with generous event volumes
Easy SDK integration for Unity and Unreal
Benchmarks against thousands of other games
cons: Free tier has sampling and data limits
Custom analysis is limited compared to warehouse tools
Data retention shorter than paid competitors
review.verdict: Still the default free analytics for mobile games; good starting point, but you'll outgrow it at scale.
review.best_for: Indie and early-stage mobile game studios needing free, prebuilt KPIs and benchmarks.
review.not_for: Large studios, non-gaming products, or teams wanting warehouse-native event analytics.
